Many briars on the North side if the VA Capital Trail, near mile marker 40, especially along west bank of the creek. Access: Public.
3240 New Market Rd, Henrico, VA 23231, USA
Many briars on the North side if the VA Capital Trail, just west of Four Mile Creek trail head. Access: Public.
Many briars on the North side if the VA Capital Trail, just west of power line easement. LOTS of flowering vines. Access: Public.
Many briars on the North side if the VA Capital Trail, near mile marker 41, in between 295 overpasses. Access: Public.

Sizeable briars on the North and South sides of the VA Capital Trail, near mile marker 43, at power line easement. FYI: these areas are often sprayed with heavy pesticides to keep lines clear. Bushes are at edges, and may avoid the worst of the spray leachate.

Good stand of elderberry near where the creek loops closest to the VA Capital Trail. Flowers are wonderful in tea or liqour, and the berries are quite nutritious. Watch for poison ivy here! Access: Public.
